about.title: Sobre mi
about.header: Desenvolupador Backend | Competent en Frontend | Programador de Videojocs
about.text-1: Desenvolupador Backend amb experiència professional en programació i desenvolupament.
about.text-2: Graduat en Desenvolupament de Videojocs (Tecnocampus – UPF), amb coneixements sòlids en desenvolupament backend i habilitats complementàries en frontend. Apassionat per crear productes eficients i escalables que ofereixin una experiència d’usuari òptima.
about.text-3: Compto amb experiència treballant en equips àgils i multidisciplinaris en projectes tècnicament exigents. Em motiva l’aprenentatge continu, la resolució de problemes i aportar valor tant al desenvolupament software com als productes interactius.

eddy.title: The Frightening Nightmare of Little Eddy

experience-1.position: Programador de Videojocs Junior | Nexxyo Labs / Maniac Panda Games
experience-1.text-1: Participació en el desenvolupament de Racerloop, un joc free-to-play arcade de carreres de naus espacials per a PC.
experience-1.text-2: Contribució en implementació de gameplay, mecàniques de joc, sistemes de joc, UI, àudio, VFX, tools i bug-fixing.
experience-1.text-3: Col·laboració en un equip multidisciplinari utilitzant motodologies Agile / Scrum.
experience-1.text-4: Tecnologies: C#, Unity, Git, GitHub, Jira, Confluence.

education-1.title: Grau Universitari en Desenvolupament de Videojocs | Tecnocampus (UPF)

education-2.title: Desenvolupament Backend | IT Academy (Barcelona Activa - UPC)

about.title: Sobre mí

about.text-1: Desarrollador Backend con experiencia profesional en programación y desarrollo.
about.text-2: Graduado en Desarrollo de Videojuegos (Tecnocampus – UPF), con sólidos conocimientos en desarrollo backend y habilidades complementarias en frontend. Apasionado por crear productos eficientes y escalables que brinden una excelente experiencia de usuario.
about.text-3: Cuento con experiencia trabajando en equipos ágiles y multidisciplinarios en proyectos técnicamente exigentes. Me motiva el aprendizaje continuo, la resolución de problemas y aportar valor tanto al desarrollo de software como a los productos interactivos.

about.title: About
about.header: Backend Developer | Frontend Skilled | Game Programmer
about.text-1: Backend Developer with professional experience in programming and development.
about.text-2: Graduated in Video Game Development (Tecnocampus – UPF), with solid knowledge in backend development and complementary frontend skills. I’m passionate about building efficient, scalable products that deliver a strong user experience.
about.text-3: I have experience working in agile, multidisciplinary teams on technically demanding projects. I'm driven by continuous learning, problem-solving, and contributing value to both software development and interactive products.

racerloop.title: Racerloop
racerloop.text-1: Racerloop is a free to play arcade ship racing game for PC. It is made with Unity.
racerloop.text-2: As a junior programmer, I worked on several aspects of the game programming including gameplay, game mechanics, game systems, UI, sound, VFXs, tools, bugfixing, etc.

eddy.title: The Frightening Nightmare of Little Eddy
eddy.text-1: The Frightening Nightmare of Little Eddy is an adventure game for PC with puzzle and combat. It was made with Unity by a team of 6 students in 10 weeks as a university project.
eddy.text-2: The game won 4 out of 5 awards at the university video games festival, including the Technical Excellence award. It also was a finalist at the Fun&Serious Game Festival in the category of New Talents.
eddy.text-3: I was one of the two programmers in the team. I worked on different aspects related to game mechanics and systems. The AIs programming was also one of my responsibilities, as well as the implementation of the sound. I also was in charge of the implementation of different features and systems like the camera behaviour.

minimax.title: Adaptive Difficulty in Board Games
minimax.text-1: Adaptive Difficulty in Board Games is the title of my Bachelor's Degree Final Project. It consists in the design of an AI algorithm based on Minimax that adapts its performance dynamically depending on the skills of its opponent in board games. The algorithm was implemented with the Checkers game using Unity to test and prove its performance.
minimax.text-2: The project was graded with a final mark of an excellent.

temple.title: The Temple
temple.text-1: The Temple is a top-down shooter game inspired by Lovecraft's universe.
temple.text-2: It was made with Unity by a team of 4 students as a university project.
temple.text-3: I was the main programmer on the team, working on all the aspects related to game programming.

experience-1.position: Junior Game Programmer | Nexxyo Labs / Maniac Panda Games
experience-1.text-1: Worked on Racerloop, a free-to-play arcade ship-racing game for PC.
experience-1.text-2: Contributed to gameplay features, game mechanics, game systems, UI, audio, VFX, tools, and bug fixing.
experience-1.text-3: Collaborated within a multidisciplinary team using Agile/Scrum methodologies.
experience-1.text-4: Technologies: C#, Unity, Git, GitHub, Jira, Confluence.

education-1.title: Bachelor’s Degree in Video Game Development | Tecnocampus (UPF)

education-2.title: Backend Development | IT Academy (Barcelona Activa - UPC)
